products.name: Riso Carnaroli
pros: Italian excellence with large, tapered grains
Maintains al dente texture in risotto

products.name: Riso Basmati
pros: Long, slender grains with distinct aroma

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s November 2025 laboratory tests recommend Riso Carnaroli and Riso Basmati as top‑rated brands, highlighting their grain quality, cooking performance and flavor profile.
